meta.character: a generic humanoid figure in everyday scenarios

style_suffixes: glitch effect, RGB color shift, reality breaking apart
simulation error overlay, digital artifacts, pixel corruption
time loop glitch, stuttering motion, déjà vu distortion
gravity inversion, physics malfunction, floating debris
morphing objects, liquid geometry, reality texture tearing
mirror world glitch, duplicate reflections, clone artifacts
color drain then oversaturate, reality desaturating then exploding
object phasing through surfaces, ghost trail, afterimage glitch
zoom glitch, sudden jump cut, reality zoom-in distortion
sky and ground swapping, horizon flip, upside-down world

everyday_glitches.hook: When your coffee pours upward instead of down
everyday_glitches.visual_prompt: a cup of coffee pouring upward defying gravity in a kitchen, liquid floating up, glitch effect, RGB color shift, surreal simulation error, vertical 9:16
everyday_glitches.voice_line: Wait... did the simulation just forget how gravity works?

everyday_glitches.hook: The moment the sky loads the wrong texture
everyday_glitches.visual_prompt: outdoor scene where the sky has wrong texture like a video game loading error, pixelated clouds, digital artifacts, simulation glitch, vertical 9:16
everyday_glitches.voice_line: Someone in the control room pressed the wrong button.

everyday_glitches.hook: When shadows move the wrong direction
everyday_glitches.visual_prompt: person walking on a sunny street but shadow moves independently in wrong direction, uncanny glitch, reality error, simulation artifact, vertical 9:16
everyday_glitches.voice_line: Your shadow just got its own free will. That's a glitch.

everyday_glitches.hook: Mirror shows a version of you from 5 seconds in the future
everyday_glitches.visual_prompt: person standing in front of a bathroom mirror, mirror reflection shows them doing something 5 seconds ahead, time glitch, surreal, vertical 9:16
everyday_glitches.voice_line: What if mirrors are actually 5 seconds ahead of reality?

everyday_glitches.hook: The moment your reflection blinks at the wrong time
everyday_glitches.visual_prompt: close-up of a face looking in a mirror, the reflection blinks slightly off-sync, uncanny glitch effect, eerie simulation error, vertical 9:16
everyday_glitches.voice_line: It blinked first. That's not how mirrors work.

nature_glitches.hook: Tree growing in reverse at 1000x speed
nature_glitches.visual_prompt: a tree rapidly un-growing, leaves flying back onto branches, wood compressing back into seed, reverse time lapse, glitch effect, simulation rewind, vertical 9:16
nature_glitches.voice_line: The simulation hit Ctrl+Z on that tree.

nature_glitches.hook: Ocean decides it's tired and just stops moving
nature_glitches.visual_prompt: vast ocean where all waves suddenly freeze completely still, perfectly flat glass-like water, eerie silence, reality error, simulation pause, vertical 9:16
nature_glitches.voice_line: Someone paused the ocean. Update in progress.

nature_glitches.hook: Rain falls upward but only in one spot
nature_glitches.visual_prompt: rain falling upward in a single column in a park, surrounding area normal, localized gravity anomaly, glitch in reality, surreal, vertical 9:16
nature_glitches.voice_line: Local gravity patch. The devs are still working on it.

nature_glitches.hook: A flock of birds frozen mid-flight
nature_glitches.visual_prompt: dozens of birds frozen mid-flight in a blue sky, perfectly still, time stopped, glitch effect, simulation pause, eerie photo-real, vertical 9:16
nature_glitches.voice_line: Someone hit pause at exactly the wrong moment.

physics_glitches.hook: Fire burns cold and ice melts upward
physics_glitches.visual_prompt: candle flame that is cold blue and freezing objects near it while an ice cube melts upward into steam, inverted physics, reality error, glitch, vertical 9:16
physics_glitches.voice_line: Hot and cold just swapped. Classic simulation day.

physics_glitches.hook: Car drives fine but its wheels are spinning the wrong way
physics_glitches.visual_prompt: car driving forward on a road but wheels spinning backwards, uncanny motion glitch, reality error, surreal CGI quality, vertical 9:16
physics_glitches.voice_line: The physics engine is running but not fully synchronized.

physics_glitches.hook: Stack of books floating one inch above the table forever
physics_glitches.visual_prompt: stack of old books levitating exactly one inch above a wooden table, no explanation, slight digital artifact glow underneath, reality glitch, vertical 9:16
physics_glitches.voice_line: Gravity exemption granted. No reason given.

human_glitches.hook: Your clone walks past you going the opposite direction
human_glitches.visual_prompt: person walking down a street, identical clone of them walking in the opposite direction, both wearing same clothes, reality duplication glitch, vertical 9:16
human_glitches.voice_line: Did the renderer just spawn a duplicate NPC?

human_glitches.hook: Everyone in the cafe freezes except you
human_glitches.visual_prompt: busy cafe where every single person is frozen mid-action, coffee cups in mid-air, one person standing normally looking around confused, simulation pause, vertical 9:16
human_glitches.voice_line: You've been excluded from the update. Lucky you.

human_glitches.hook: Your hands phase through the keyboard
human_glitches.visual_prompt: close-up of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, fingers occasionally phasing through the keys, ghost hands, simulation collision error, digital artifact, vertical 9:16
human_glitches.voice_line: Collision detection failed. Relogging won't fix this.

cosmic_glitches.hook: The moon renders at low resolution tonight
cosmic_glitches.visual_prompt: nighttime sky with the moon appearing in extremely low pixel resolution like a video game asset, everything else normal quality, LOD glitch, simulation error, vertical 9:16
cosmic_glitches.voice_line: They forgot to load the high-res moon texture.

cosmic_glitches.hook: Sun rises twice in one morning
cosmic_glitches.visual_prompt: time-lapse of sunrise, sun rises normally, then RESETS back below horizon and rises again, simulation rewind glitch, reality error, surreal sky, vertical 9:16

cosmic_glitches.hook: Stars form perfect geometric shapes at 3am
cosmic_glitches.visual_prompt: nighttime sky where stars slowly align into perfect geometric patterns, triangles hexagons forming in the stars, reality code visible, simulation geometry, vertical 9:16
cosmic_glitches.voice_line: The source code is showing through. Zoom in.

voice_line_templates: The devs are still working on {issue}.
Someone forgot to load the {asset} texture.
The physics engine is running but not fully {sync_state}.
random_details: with hexadecimal code floating in background
